title: lepisorus onoei
intro: Lepisorus onoei, also known as the Japanese cliff fern or Osumi cliff fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepisorus onoei include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Lepisorus onoei can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or dried extracts, although further research is needed to standardize its usage and potential interactions.
